detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Dodo.openTrading() (Dodo.sol#631-657):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (Dodo.sol#641)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Dodo.sol#643)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Dodo.sol#643)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (Dodo.sol#653)
	Dodo.tradingOpen (Dodo.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Dodo.openTrading() (Dodo.sol#631-657)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Dodo._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Dodo.sol#497-561):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Dodo.sol#543)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Dodo.sol#575-587)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Dodo.sol#549)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (Dodo.sol#625)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Dodo.sol#559)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Dodo.sol#713)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Dodo.sol#693)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Dodo.sol#695)
	Dodo._rOwned (Dodo.sol#297) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Dodo._takeTeam(uint256) (Dodo.sol#707-715)
	- Dodo._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Dodo.sol#689-703)
	- Dodo.balanceOf(address) (Dodo.sol#415-419)
	- Dodo.constructor() (Dodo.sol#365-379)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Dodo.sol#559)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Dodo.sol#721)
	Dodo._rTotal (Dodo.sol#313) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Dodo._getCurrentSupply() (Dodo.sol#813-823)
	- Dodo._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Dodo.sol#719-725)
	- Dodo.constructor() (Dodo.sol#365-379)
	- Dodo.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Dodo.sol#471-479)
